name: SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC_DIN
title: SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateChargeParameterDiscoveryReqDC_DIN ( byte SessionID[], byte StatusFlags[], char ErrorCode[], char EnergyTransferType[], float MaxCurrent, float MaxVoltage)
description: Creates a Charge Parameter Discovery Request message for sending, using the DC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
